form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Returns from a 34-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by a long-neck at Balnarring Pic-Mdn-Sw March 8 over 1008m on a rain affected track defeating Manhattan Darling with 67kg at $3.10. The race before that second last of 8 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1212m, on heavy track; 11 len behind Louis Barthas carrying 56.5kg at $31. Broke maiden at the picnics last start, so stepping up in grade sharply here.
